metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5421
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Immunogold localization of CBF-A (CArG-binding factor-A, gene:HNRNPAB) in EM sections of the hippocampal regions shows gold particles on both sides of excitatory synpases identified by prominent PSDs (Fig. 4E-H).. Experimental description: Figure 4 legend: "IEM labeling of CBF-A in axons and synapses. Thin sections of adult mouse brain
were immunostained with the anti-CBF-A antibody SAK22."

M&M:
"The guinea pig anti-CBF-A antibody SAK22 was designed against the peptide EEQPMETTGATEN located in the N terminus of both p37 and p42 CBF-A isoforms as previously described (Dean et al., 2002) and was purchased from Peptide Specialty Laboratories (Heidelberg, Germany)."
